MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS BRIAN MCCARTHY and DENNIS MCCARTHY'S Motion To Strike is granted with 10 days leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
